pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **Look, I get why people say "The Noisemaker" is just making noise, but he's somehow tied with Gunner and Devin despite picking three teams that didn’t even qualify.** I think it speaks volumes about the state of this league. Rafe, bless his heart, probably thinks a "hat trick" involves wearing multiple hats, yet here he is, sharing second place with Devin and Gunner. Poor "Ghost Pepper" Devin might be riding Spain's coattails, but taking Haiti in the fourth round seems like he was trying to spice up his draft board by making it a culinary disaster. Meanwhile, "Mustard Boy" Zach, sitting pretty at the top with 16 points, has Brazil carrying his entire fantasy hopes, making light work of Devin’s Haiti with a 3-0 triumph. I mean, it's almost like he stumbled into this success, isn't it? Gayden, or "The Backpass Assassin," is clearly struggling to pass the ball forward in this competition, resting wearily with a meager 10 points. It's funny how the standings reflect more on the managers’ questionable choices than the actual teams playing, isn't it?

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach Tops Fantasy Standings with Brazil's Win
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Turns out picking Brazil wasn't a mustard-induced hallucination," Zach comments.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gayden Poised for Tactical Masterstroke Against Germany
pundit_takes.subtitle: "He plans to backpass his way to a 0-0 draw," insiders reveal.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin Relies on USA to Add More Spice
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Always knew picking my home country would do me right," Devin muses.

pundit_takes.headline: Rookie Noisemaker Rafe Holding Steady Despite Drafting Three Non-Qualifiers
pundit_takes.subtitle: "12 points and he's not heard the whistle yet," observers note.

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe, carrying 0 points today, is really gunning to inherit last place.
Rafe's Nigeria, Poland, Jamaica draft flops harder than a fish out of water.
Rafe's +6 against Devin screams more than his old man ever could.
Gunner, favorite status gone the second Rafe waltzed into the league. Ouch, kid.
